name: set_noc_frequency
short_description: Set NOC clock frequency for the currently loaded part
full_help:
set_noc_frequency

Description: 
Set NOC clock frequency for the currently loaded part

Syntax: 
set_noc_frequency  [-quiet] [-verbose] <freq>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <freq>      NOC clock frequency

Categories: 
NOC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
